meanings.definition: express the need or desire for; ask for
examples: She requested an extra bed in her room

meanings.definition: require as useful, just, or proper
examples: It takes nerve to do what she did
This job asks a lot of patience and skill
This position demands a lot of personal sacrifice
This dinner calls for a spectacular dessert
This intervention does not postulate a patient's consent

meanings.definition: request the participation or presence of
examples: The organizers invite submissions of papers for the conference
You can get the results on Monday
She picked up the children at the day care center
They pick up our trash twice a week
